description: You are a backend developer setting up a local development environment for an existing web application at /home/ga/Documents/docker-projects/webapp/. Create a docker-compose.override.yml file in the project directory to apply development-specific changes without modifying the original docker-compose.yml. The API service must be configured with environment variables FLASK_DEBUG=1 and FLASK_ENV=development, a bind mount from the host directory ./api to /app in the container, the command 'flask run --host=0.0.0.0 --port=5000 --reload', and a port mapping of 5678:5678. The DB service must include a port mapping of 5432:5432. Start the application and ensure the web, api, and db services are running with the new configuration.
